sections.content:
Now I see - the white pixels at [54,24], [55,23], [56,22] became gray (G), and the gray shape at [58-61, 26-29] became white (W). So clicking on the purple pixel at [59,27] swaps colors between the white and gray objects and the gray shape.
The pattern is:
- Clicking on magenta [57,25] toggles the purple square's position along the path
- Clicking on purple [59,27] swaps colors between the white and gray objects
Let me think about what the goal might be. Looking at the image, I see:
- Purple ring at top (the hexagon)
- Purple square with magenta center near gray shape at bottom
- White pixels near the purple square
The goal might be to make the gray shape white and white pixels gray? Or vice versa? Let me try clicking on the magenta again to see if it changes the state in a meaningful way.
